name: skill_wager
description: Tests the interaction between online skill learning and deposit-driven effective wagers across agents with different forecast quality.

name: forecast_aggregation
description: Compares aggregate forecast quality across weighting rules: uniform, deposit-only, skill-only, and the full mechanism.

name: behaviour_matrix
description: Holds the mechanism fixed and varies only behaviour modules: benign baselines, realistic frictions, and adversaries.

name: parameter_sweep
description: Sweeps over λ and σ_min to map the Pareto frontier between forecast quality and concentration.

name: calibration
description: Evaluates the calibration of the aggregate forecast by checking quantile coverage against nominal levels.

name: settlement_sanity
description: Verifies that the settlement mechanism is budget-balanced and payouts are non-negative.

name: fixed_deposit
description: Examines skill evolution when all agents make identical fixed deposits each round.

name: intermittency_stress_test
description: Compares IID vs bursty vs edge-threshold vs avoid-skill-decay participation.

name: sybil
description: Tests whether sybil splitting gains an advantage under the mechanism.

name: arbitrage_scan
description: Runs arbitrageurs across a parameter grid to see when arbitrage appears and whether it dominates wealth.

name: weight_learning
description: Tests whether online learning converges to the correct weights for a mixture DGP.

name: skill_recovery
description: Tests whether skill estimates recover after perturbation across CRPS and MAE scoring.

name: detection_adaptation
description: Compares a fixed manipulator with an adaptive evader that balances manipulation with detector evasion.

name: deposit_policy_comparison
description: Compares deposit policies to understand their effect on market concentration and forecast quality.
